column1: Device shows new firmware version in 'show version' command output.

Steps: 1. Check service status. 2. Attempt graceful restart. 3. Force restart if graceful fails. 4. Verify service functionality.
Root cause: disk full on DNS server.

Steps: 1. Backup configuration. 2. Download firmware. 3. Install firmware. 4. Reboot device. 5. Verify functionality.
